question: Buatkan YAML RoleBinding untuk memberikan akses role 'developer' ke ServiceAccount 'dev-sa' di namespace development

ground_truth.answer:
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: RoleBinding
metadata:
  name: dev-binding
  namespace: development
subjects:
- kind: ServiceAccount
  name: dev-sa
  namespace: development
roleRef:
  kind: Role
  name: developer
  apiGroup: rbac.authorization.k8s.io
context: RoleBinding untuk menghubungkan ServiceAccount dengan Role
Subjects berisi ServiceAccount 'dev-sa' di namespace development
RoleRef menunjuk ke Role 'developer' dengan apiGroup rbac.authorization.k8s.io
